response.overview: A family is having fish for lunch at a restaurant, while the parents are arguing about a stranger’s visit to their house, and their son’s dreamy mind is obsessing over the eyes of fish and their dreams.  When the boy finds a small diamond ring inside his piece of fish, the heated argument between the parents escalates into a fight over the boy’s diamond ring and who gets to have it, while the boy’s mind fixates even more, on the fish’s eye.
response.title: Fish & Rice
